tomas.description: TomÃ¡s? He's my best driver â€” been with me fifteen years. Honest as they come, knows every road between here and Silvermoor. You can trust him because I trust him, and I don't trust easily.

emotion_variants.afraid: TomÃ¡s... he's out there on the Northern Road right now. If anything's happened to him... *voice breaks* He's been with me fifteen years. Like a son to me.
emotion_variants.sad: *quiet voice* TomÃ¡s. Fifteen years he's driven for me. Best man I've ever employed. I pray to the gods he's safe.
emotion_variants.friendly: Ah, TomÃ¡s! Best driver in the business. Been with me fifteen years â€” reliable, honest, knows every shortcut between here and Silvermoor. If you meet him on the road, tell him Garen says hello.

tomas.secret_description: Between you and me... TomÃ¡s has a gambling problem. Owes money to some unsavory people in Silvermoor. I've been helping him pay it off quietly. Don't mention it to him.

elara.description: *pauses* Elara was my wife. Finest woman in all of Ironhaven â€” could spot a forged coin from across the room and keep the books better than any scribe. I lost her to the winter fever five years ago. I keep her ring in the safe. Safest place I know.

emotion_variants.friendly: *warm but sad smile* Elara... she was the heart of this shop. Everything good about Ironfoot's Emporium started with her. Five years gone, and I still set two cups at tea time. Old habits.
emotion_variants.sad: *long silence* ...I don't talk about Elara much. It still hurts. She was everything.

aldren.description: Aldren? He's the weaponsmith two streets over. Good work, fair prices â€” though he charges more than he should for enchantment. We've been friendly rivals for twenty years. He makes the weapons, I sell everything else. Works out well enough.

brennan.description: Brennan was my partner on the Frostpeak Run back in '14. Tough as nails, terrible sense of direction. We nearly froze to death on that mountain pass. He retired to a farm outside Redstone. I owe him my life â€” he pulled me out of an avalanche.

thessaly.description: Old Thessaly? She runs the herbalist shop near the market square. Bit eccentric â€” talks to her plants, claims she can read fortunes in tea leaves. But her healing potions are the real deal. I send customers her way when they need remedies.

the_duke.description: Duke Aldric rules Ironhaven â€” or tries to. He's got the Merchant's Alliance in his pocket through tariff agreements. Fair enough ruler, I suppose, though the taxes have been climbing. The Alliance has agreements with him â€” tariff protections, caravan escorts. Those matter more to me than politics.

emotion_variants.suspicious: *lowers voice* The duke's been... different lately. Quiet. His guards have been asking questions around the market. I don't like it.

the_duke.secret_description: *looks around* I'll tell you something â€” the duke's coffers are thinner than he lets on. I've seen the trade manifests. Tax revenue is down, and he's been taking loans from... foreign interests. That's not public knowledge, and I'd appreciate if it stayed that way.

mirella.description: Mirella handles my books â€” sharpest mind with numbers I've ever seen. She's been with me since Elara passed. Quiet woman, keeps to herself, but she catches discrepancies in the ledger that I'd miss entirely.

ironhaven.description: Ironhaven â€” my home for forty years. It's a trade city, built where the Northern Road meets the river. Not the biggest city, but the busiest market this side of the mountains. The Merchant's Alliance runs the commerce, the duke runs the politics, and somehow we all make it work.

silvermoor.description: Silvermoor is five days' ride south along the trade road. Beautiful city â€” white stone walls, famous for silk, dyes, and enchanted fabrics. Half my best inventory comes from there. The Silvermoor Weavers' Guild is the finest in the realm.

blackhollow.description: *voice drops* Blackhollow is a stretch of forest on the Northern Road, about two days' ride from here. Dark place â€” the trees grow thick and the road narrows. Three caravans have gone missing there in the past two months. Merchants talk about shadows in the treeline. I don't know what's out there, but I don't send drivers through after dark anymore.
blackhollow.relationship_to_npc: dangerous area on my trade route

emotion_variants.afraid: *grips counter* Blackhollow... that's where my caravans keep disappearing. Something is very wrong in those woods. Don't go there. Please.

northern_road.description: The Northern Road runs from Ironhaven through Blackhollow and up to the mountain passes. Main trade route for half the merchants in the Alliance. Used to be safe â€” now I'm not so sure. Three caravans missed their schedule this month.

frostpeak.description: Frostpeak Pass â€” the mountain crossing north of the trade routes. Brutal in winter, barely passable even in summer. I nearly died there in '14 with my partner Brennan. Beautiful though â€” you can see three kingdoms from the summit on a clear day.
frostpeak.relationship_to_npc: nearly died there, memorable trade route

redstone.description: Redstone is a mining town east of here. Iron, copper, some gemstones. Rough place, rough people, but they pay well for supplies. My old partner Brennan retired to a farm just outside it.

merchants_alliance.description: The Merchant's Alliance is the trade guild that runs commerce in this region. I'm the Guild Master â€” have been for twelve years. We negotiate tariffs with the duke, organize caravan escorts, settle trade disputes. It's not glamorous work, but without us, this city's economy would collapse in a month.

caravan_disappearances.description: Three caravans have vanished on the Northern Road in the past two months. Two came back empty â€” drivers said they were robbed by something fast, something they couldn't see clearly. The third hasn't come back at all. Now my own caravan with TomÃ¡s is overdue. The Alliance is getting nervous. We'll be hiring sellswords by the dozen if this doesn't stop.

emotion_variants.afraid: The caravans... four gone now, counting mine. People are dying on that road, and nobody knows why. The duke's guards say they'll investigate, but I haven't seen them lift a finger.

starfire_essence.description: Starfire Essence? Rare alchemical compound â€” glows with an inner light, used in high-end enchantments. I've only had three bottles pass through my shop in forty years. Worth more than its weight in gold. If you find any, bring it to me first â€” I'll give you a fair price.

caravan.description: My caravan is my lifeblood â€” three wagons of goods, two drivers, and a mule team that knows the Northern Road better than most people. The latest shipment was supposed to arrive four days ago with Silvermoor silks and enchanting reagents. TomÃ¡s was driving. It hasn't arrived.
caravan.relationship_to_npc: my trade caravan â€” currently missing

emotion_variants.afraid: *grips counter* My caravan... TomÃ¡s was driving it through Blackhollow. Four days overdue. I can't sleep thinking about what might have happened.
emotion_variants.sad: *stares at the empty shelves* The caravan should have been here days ago. Those goods... that's months of negotiation with the Silvermoor weavers.

synthesus.description: Synthesus is one of the other characters in the Synthesus system.

computress.description: Computress is one of the other characters in the Synthesus system.
